items.titolo: OpenAI walks back statement it wants a government 'backstop' for its massive loans — company says government 'playing its part' critical for industrial AI capacity increases
items.descrizione: OpenAI has walked back claims its CFO made in an interview that it was looking for a governmental backstop for its investments, providing a guarantee against its loans that would allow it to borrow more and reduce the…

items.titolo: Let Gemini make your next slide presentation for you - here's how
items.descrizione: Struggling with your slides? Here's how Gemini's latest updates can help you polish your presentation, and who can access them.

items.titolo: Google Maps diventa un copilota intelligente grazie a Gemini
items.descrizione: Gemini trasforma Google Maps in un copilota smart con comandi vocali e mappe più intuitive.

items.titolo: Bollette stabili per tutto l’anno: blocca il prezzo di luce e gas in due minuti
